publishedAbstract: * Ceph OSD pods fail to initialize and enter a CrashLoopBackOff state ~~~ bdev(...) open open got: (16) Device or resource busy BlueStore.cc: FAILED ceph_assert(r == 0) *** Caught signal (Aborted) ** ~~~
publishedTitle: Ceph OSD Crash: BlueStore Assert Failure due to Device or resource busy (Error 16)
